title: Spell Referenced Rules Enrichment
excerpt: Aggregates the glossary and rules links referenced by captured canonical spell pages, grouped by rule and by spell.
markdown:
# Spell Referenced Rules Enrichment

This glossary enrichment entry aggregates the `Referenced Rules` links copied from spell canonical snapshot blocks.
It is not runtime spell truth. It is a cross-link surface that shows which glossary/rules concepts are being cited by the canonical spell pages captured so far.

Total referenced rules captured: 33
Suppressed raw references: 8

## Attack Action

- Description: Attack Action The most common [[action]] taken in combat is the Attack action.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Arcane Sword

## Attack Rolls

- Description: Attack Rolls An attack roll determines whether an attack hits a target.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Arcane Sword

## Attunement

- Description: Attunement Some magic items require a creature to form a bond called Attunement with them before the creature can use an item's magical properties.
- Referenced By 2 Spell(s): Greater Restoration, Identify

## Bonus Action

- Description: Bonus Action Various class features, spells, and other abilities let you take an additional action on your turn called a bonus action.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Arcane Sword

## Bright Light

- Description: Bright Light Bright Light lets most creatures see normally.
- Referenced By 13 Spell(s): Conjure Celestial, Continual Flame, Darkness, Daylight, Fire Shield, Flame Blade, Flaming Sphere, Hallow, Light, Prismatic Wall, Produce Flame, Shining Smite, Sunbeam

## Concentration

- Description: Concentration Some spells require you to maintain concentration in order to keep their magic active.
- Referenced By 10 Spell(s): Dominate Beast, Dominate Monster, Dominate Person, Earthquake, Flesh to Stone, Glyph of Warding, Hex, Major Image, Sleet Storm, Wall of Stone

## Cone

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 7 Spell(s): Burning Hands, Color Spray, Cone of Cold, Conjure Barrage, Dragon's Breath, Fear, Prismatic Spray

## Cube

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 22 Spell(s): Cloud of Daggers, Control Water, Create or Destroy Water, Creation, Disintegrate, Fabricate, Faerie Fire, Fire Storm, Forcecage, Hallucinatory Terrain, Heroes' Feast, Hypnotic Pattern, Major Image, Minor Illusion, Mordenkainen's Magnificent Mansion, Mordenkainen's Private Sanctum, Phantasmal Force, Programmed Illusion, Silent Image, Slow, Thunderwave, Web

## curse

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 3 Spell(s): Hex, Remove Curse, True Resurrection

## Cylinder

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 8 Spell(s): Call Lightning, Conjure Celestial, Flame Strike, Ice Storm, Magic Circle, Moonbeam, Reverse Gravity, Sleet Storm

## D20 Tests

- Description: D20 Tests When the outcome of an action is uncertain, the game uses a d20 roll to determine success or failure.
- Referenced By 3 Spell(s): Foresight, Ray of Enfeeblement, Resurrection

## Darkness

- Description: Darkness Darkness creates a Heavily Obscured area .
- Referenced By 6 Spell(s): Darkness, Daylight, Hallow, Hunger of Hadar, Leomund's Tiny Hut, Sunburst

## Difficult Terrain

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 17 Spell(s): Blade Barrier, Conjure Minor Elementals, Earthquake, Entangle, Evard's Black Tentacles, Freedom of Movement, Grease, Guardian Of Nature, Hunger of Hadar, Ice Storm, Insect Plague, Mirage Arcane, Sleet Storm, Speak with Plants, Spike Growth, Storm of Vengeance, Web

## Dim Light

- Description: Dim Light Dim Light, also called shadows, creates a Lightly Obscured area .
- Referenced By 15 Spell(s): Continual Flame, Darkness, Daylight, Faerie Fire, Fire Shield, Flame Blade, Flaming Sphere, Leomund's Tiny Hut, Light, Moonbeam, Prismatic Wall, Produce Flame, Starry Wisp, Sunbeam, Symbol

## Emanation

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 18 Spell(s): Antilife Shell, Antimagic Field, Arms of Hadar, Aura of Vitality, Conjure Minor Elementals, Conjure Woodland Beings, Crusader's Mantle, Darkness, Daylight, Destructive Wave, Globe of Invulnerability, Holy Aura, Leomund's Tiny Hut, Pass without Trace, Speak with Plants, Spirit Guardians, Thunderclap, Word of Radiance

## Friendly

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 4 Spell(s): Charm Monster, Charm Person, Simulacrum, True Polymorph

## Half Cover

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Sacred Flame

## Heavily Obscured

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 9 Spell(s): Cloudkill, Druid Grove, Fog Cloud, Guards and Wards, Incendiary Cloud, Shadow Of Moil, Sleet Storm, Stinking Cloud, Storm of Vengeance

## Hostile

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 2 Spell(s): Calm Emotions, Glyph of Warding

## Indifferent

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Calm Emotions

## Lightly Obscured

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 2 Spell(s): Insect Plague, Web

## Line

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 3 Spell(s): Gust of Wind, Lightning Bolt, Sunbeam

## Passive Perception

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Enthrall

## possessed

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 4 Spell(s): Hallow, Magic Circle, Magic Jar, Protection from Evil and Good

## Shape-Shifting

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 6 Spell(s): Animal Shapes, Gaseous Form, Moonbeam, Polymorph, Shapechange, True Polymorph

## Spell Duration Rules

- Description: Spell Duration Rules A spell's duration is the length of time the spell persists after it is cast.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Arcane Sword

## Spell Effects (Targets, Saves, Attacks)

- Description: Spell Effects (Targets, Saves, Attacks) The effects of a spell are detailed after its duration entry.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Arcane Sword

## Spell Range Rules

- Description: Spell Range Rules A spell's range indicates how far from the spellcaster the spell's effect can originate, and the spell's description specifies which part of the effect is limited by the range.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Arcane Sword

## Sphere

- Description: A Sphere is an area of effect that extends in straight lines from a point of origin outward in all directions. The effect that creates a Sphere specifies the distance it extends as the radius of the Sphere. A Sphere's point of origin is included in the Sphere's area of effect.
- Referenced By 28 Spell(s): Acid Splash, Calm Emotions, Circle of Death, Cloudkill, Confusion, Darkness, Daylight, Delayed Blast Fireball, Fireball, Fog Cloud, Glyph of Warding, Hunger of Hadar, Incendiary Cloud, Insect Plague, Meteor Swarm, Otiluke's Freezing Sphere, Plant Growth, Purify Food and Drink, Shatter, Silence, Sleep, Spike Growth, Stinking Cloud, Sunburst, Symbol, Vitriolic Sphere, Weird, Zone of Truth

## Stable

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 1 Spell(s): Spare the Dying

## Temporary Hit Points

- Description: Temporary Hit Points Some spells and special abilities confer temporary hit points to a creature.
- Referenced By 8 Spell(s): Animal Shapes, Armor of Agathys, False Life, Guardian Of Nature, Heroism, Polymorph, Shapechange, True Polymorph

## Three-Quarters Cover

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 2 Spell(s): Blade Barrier, Sacred Flame

## Total Cover

- Description: No glossary description matched yet.
- Referenced By 3 Spell(s): Draconic Transformation, Enervation, Witch Bolt

These labels were captured from canonical spell pages but are currently treated as too incidental or too low-value to expose as standalone glossary rule entries.
